metadata.reference: A. Ciesielski, L. Skowronski, M. Trzinski, E. Gorecka, P. Trautman, T. Szoplik. Evidence of germanium segregation in gold thin films. Surf. Sci. 674, 73-78 (2018) (Numerical data kindly provided by Arkadiusz Ciesielski)
metadata.comments: 35 nm-thick gold film deposited directly on SiO<sub>2</sub> substrate
